property.name: testAssignCargoToDriver
property.value: Business can assign cargo to driver

property.name: testPermissionForBusinessEndpoints
property.value: Unauthorized access blocked for business endpoints

property.name: testPermissionForDriverEndpoints
property.value: Unauthorized access blocked for driver endpoints

property.name: testPermissionForCustomerEndpoints
property.value: Unauthorized access blocked for customer endpoints

property.name: AddcargoComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: AddcargoComponent form invalid when fields are empty

property.name: AddcargoComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled
property.value: AddcargoComponent form valid when all fields are filled

property.name: HttpService should assign driver to cargo
HttpService should get assigned orders for driver
property.value: HttpService fetches assigned orders for driver

property.name: HttpService should assign driver to cargo
HttpService should fetch cargo
property.value: HttpService fetches cargo list for business

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty
property.value: LoginComponent form invalid when fields are empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty
property.value: LoginComponent form invalid when one field is missing

property.name: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent form valid when username and password provided

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent form invalid when fields are empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid
RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
property.value: RegistrationComponent form valid with correct inputs
